description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard parcel, sealed securely with a strip of clear packing tape running along the top seam. The box is made from corrugated cardboard, evident from the subtle linear texture and slight creases visible on its surfaces. The tape is slightly glossy and contrasts with the matte, light brown color of the cardboard. The box appears to be in good condition, with no visible dents or tears, and the tape is firmly adhered, suggesting it has not been opened since sealing. The overall shape is a regular cuboid, with sharp, well-defined edges and corners. This type of parcel is commonly used for shipping or storage in urban environments, such as on sidewalks, in garages, or at delivery points.
description: A medium-sized, light brown cardboard box sealed with clear packing tape, featuring a matte, slightly textured surface and sharp edges.
description_view_0: Front view shows the taped seam running vertically down the center, with visible tape texture and some creases in the cardboard.
description_view_1: Side view displays a plain, uninterrupted cardboard surface with subtle vertical lines and no visible tape.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the taped seam running vertically, similar to the front, but with less pronounced creasing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view is plain, showing only the cardboard texture and no tape, mirroring the other side.
